---
title: "Mary Hicks"
---

## Mary Hicks

**Dates:** (b. 1816/7)

### Description

wife of Edmund Hicks, carpenter

### Biography

Probably the Mrs Hicks mentioned  (16 April 1860).

### Letters

- Letter from May 7th 1862[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from May 16th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
